positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, neo-art nouveau illustration featuring a central mythological creature (like a phoenix or griffin) intertwined with bioluminescent tropical flora and celestial constellations. The composition must be flawlessly central and highly graphic, designed for direct transfer onto fabric. Use a stylized color palette of deep midnight blue, vibrant turquoise, emerald green, and accents of metallic gold ink. The style must emulate detailed etching work mixed with vibrant glowing bioluminescence, ensuring strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast. The overall aesthetic should be mystical, luxurious, and modern, suitable for a premium apparel print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, low detail, text, watermark, signature, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, ugly, amateur, grayscale, muted color, messy
